title: Nevis to light up stage in aid of local education
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna will come alive on 20...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna will come alive on 20 September when South African music sensation Jimmy Nevis takes centre stage for a one-night-only performance at 34 Waenhout.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna will come alive on 20 September when South African music sensation Jimmy Nevis takes centre stage for a one-night-only performance at 34 Waenhout."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Famous for his smooth vocals and chart-topping hits, Nevis rose to stardom after winning a national TV music competition and has remained a beloved figure on the country's music scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The concert promises a dynamic mix of fan favourites and new material, delivering an electrifying night of entertainment.","html":"The concert promises a dynamic mix of fan favourites and new material, delivering an electrifying night of entertainment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But it's not just about the music - this event carries a powerful message of giving back. A portion of all ticket sales will be donated to KILT (Knysna Initiative for Learning and Teaching), a local organisation committed to improving education in the region.","html":"But it's not just about the music - this event carries a powerful message of giving back. A portion of all ticket sales will be donated to KILT (Knysna Initiative for Learning and Teaching), a local organisation committed to improving education in the region."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Proceedings start at 19:00 with tickets costing R220 for adults and R120 for children aged 5 to 12. Tickets can be booked at quicket.co.za or via [email protected].","html":"Proceedings start at 19:00 with tickets costing R220 for adults and R120 for children aged 5 to 12. Tickets can be booked at quicket.co.za or via [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Nevis to light up stage in aid of local education
